# Project Beta Notes

Random notes and decisions.

## Decision Log

### 2024-01-15: Chose PostgreSQL over MySQL

After evaluation, PostgreSQL was chosen for better JSON support
and more reliable concurrent write handling.

### 2024-02-01: Switched from REST to GraphQL

The team decided to adopt GraphQL for the public API
to reduce over-fetching and improve client flexibility.
